goal: Expose payroll run, period/payslip endpoints, and generate E-TDS CSV and SSF report
summary: Phase 5 complete. Implemented payroll and reports API: POST /api/payroll/run computes and persists payroll; GET /api/payroll/periods and /periods/:id list and detail periods; GET /api/payroll/payslip/:employeeId/:periodId returns individual payslips; GET /api/payroll/etds-export generates IRD-style TDS CSV; GET /api/payroll/ssf-report generates SSF contribution CSV; PUT /api/payroll/periods/:id/lock locks a period. All endpoints are protected by JWT and TypeScript compiles cleanly.
stepSummaries:
1. Implement payroll run route and controller [verified]
  2. Implement period, payslip, ETDS export, and SSF report endpoints [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Both steps verified route references and full-backend TypeScript compilation. Payroll run, reports, and payslip endpoints are present and mounted.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Verified: POST /api/payroll/run, /api/payroll/etds-export, /api/payroll/ssf-report exist in routes/payroll.ts; `npx tsc --noEmit` returned no errors.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to expose payroll run, period/payslip endpoints, and generate E-TDS CSV and SSF report. All endpoints are implemented and mounted at /api/payroll.
Nothing deferred. End-to-end payroll correctness will be validated in the integration phase by running docker compose, seeding, and calling the payroll run endpoint.
